name: /operator-namespace-init scaffolds the my-org folder under generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_operator && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-namespace-init.sh" my-org --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt && [ -d generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org ] && [ -f generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
